## [0.7.1](https://github.com/owner/repo/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1) (2024-08-12)


### Bug Fixes

* don't unnecessarily pass useConfig() values to the client ([613bce3](https://github.com/owner/repo/commit/613bce3))

# [0.7.0](https://github.com/owner/repo/compare/v0.6.2...v0.7.0) (2024-08-06)


### Bug Fixes

* avoid the default title/lang setting overriding the Head setting ([1f91f16](https://github.com/owner/repo/commit/1f91f16))
* export config only at /config ([d66c678](https://github.com/owner/repo/commit/d66c678))


### Features

* new `useConfig()` hook ([88496ed](https://github.com/owner/repo/commit/88496ed))
* new hook `onAfterRenderClient` ([149f555](https://github.com/owner/repo/commit/149f555))


### BREAKING CHANGES

* component `<ClientOnly>` removed: use the `clientOnly()` helper instead
* Update to `core@0.4.191` or above.
